core_mechanism: generation of exact, doubly-localized soliton (lump) solutions of an integrable nonlinear wave equation by iterated Darboux-transformation dressing of a seed background solution, with an external transport term entering the localization coordinate as a continuous geometric deformation parameter
brief_reason: The abstract builds exact fundamental and higher-order localized solutions on a background via the Darboux transformation of an integrable system, then shows a control term entering the localization coordinate continuously deforms the whole hierarchy of solutions.
